title: dysoxylum motleyanum
intro: Dysoxylum motleyanum, also known as Motley's Dysoxylum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It is a tropical tree native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia, valued for its medicinal properties. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and alkaloids, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits such as pain relief, fever reduction, and improved immune function. Dysoxylum motleyanum is traditionally used to prepare herbal remedies, including extracts, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
